creator: rs@bytecamp.net
text:
(In reply to Mark Johnston from comment #1)
Sorry for the delay, I now can comfirm that the mentioned patch fixes the problem:

# sysctl dev.amdtemp
dev.amdtemp.3.ccd6: 40.5C
dev.amdtemp.3.ccd4: 37.6C
dev.amdtemp.3.ccd2: 40.5C
dev.amdtemp.3.ccd0: 39.5C
dev.amdtemp.3.core0.sensor0: 43.2C
dev.amdtemp.3.sensor_offset: 0
dev.amdtemp.3.%parent: hostb32
dev.amdtemp.3.%pnpinfo: 
dev.amdtemp.3.%location: 
dev.amdtemp.3.%driver: amdtemp
dev.amdtemp.3.%desc: AMD CPU On-Die Thermal Sensors
